cards.name: SBM Paisabazaar Paisa +
cards.fee_waiver: Spend ₹50,000 or more in a year before your Credit Card renewal date and get your AMC fee waived off.
cards.source_section: Fee table p.4, SBM Paisabazaar Paisa + row (Joining 0, AMC 499 + GST, with spend-based waiver)

bank_defaults.cash_advance: Per card (ATM Withdrawal Fee), p.4: Mobikwik First 2.5% or INR 250 (higher); ZET 3.5% or INR 300 (higher); Kredit.Pe 2.5% or INR 100 (higher); novio 2.5% or INR 299 (higher); Magnet 2.5% or INR 300 (higher); Niyo Global 2.5% or INR 423+GST (higher); Paisabazaar Step Up 2.5% or INR 250 (higher); Paisabazaar Paisa + 2.5%
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: Per card (Late Payment Fees), p.8-9: Mobikwik First 2.5% of Total Outstanding or INR 200 (higher); ZET INR 299; Kredit.Pe 5% of outstanding (max Rs.1000); novio INR 499; Magnet INR 299; Niyo Global INR 150; Paisabazaar Step Up tiered (Upto 100=0, 100-1000=250, 1000-10000=500, >10000=750); Paisabazaar Paisa + tiered (<Rs100=None, Rs100-500=Rs100, Rs501-5000=Rs500, Rs5001-10000=Rs600, Rs10001-25000=Rs750, Rs25001-50000=Rs950, >50000=Rs1000)
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: 20 to 50 days (free credit period can range up to 48 days depending on Payment Due Date, incl. 3 days grace)
bank_defaults.source_section: Finance/interest rates per card p.5 ('Interest Rate for POS/ECOM after credit free period' & 'Interest Rate for ATM Withdrawal'): Mobikwik First 3.5%pm/42%pa; ZET 3.5%pm/42%pa; Kredit.Pe 3.5%pm/42%pa; novio 3.5%pm/42%pa (ATM 2.99%pm/35.88%pa); Magnet 2.5%pm/30%pa (ATM 3.3%pm/40%pa); Niyo Global 3%pm/36%pa; Paisabazaar Step Up 3%pm/36%pa; Paisabazaar Paisa + 3.5%pm/42%pa. Forex/Surcharge table p.6-7. Cash advance fee table p.4. Late payment fee tables p.8-9. Grace period p.6 (sec. v Interest free / Grace Period).
